zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Stephen Scrope於1351年出生在英國越可爾馬斯哈姆時，他的父親Sir Henry Scrope39歲，母親Joan35歲。他於1373年12月15日之前與Margery Welles在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1404年1月25日在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Stephen Scrope于1351年出生在英国越可爾馬斯哈姆时，他的父亲Sir Henry Scrope39岁，母亲Joan35岁。他于1373年12月15日之前与Margery Welles在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1404年1月25日在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Stephen Scrope was born in 1351, in Masham, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Henry Scrope, was 39 and his mother, Joan, was 35. He married Margery Welles before 15 December 1373, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 January 1404, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Stephen Scrope est né en 1351, à Masham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Scrope, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Margery Welles avant 15 décembre 1373, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1404, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Stephen Scrope 1351 in Masham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Scrope 39 und seine Mutter Joan 35. Er hat vor 15. Dezember 1373 in Yorkshire, England Margery Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Januar 1404 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Stephen Scrope è nato il nel 1351 nel Masham, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry Scrope, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Joan, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Margery Welles prima del 15 dicembre 1373, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 gennaio 1404, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Stephen Scropeが1351年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマシャムで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Scropeは39歳，母Joanは35歳であった。1373年12月15日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアでMargery Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1404年1月25日に故郷で53歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Stephen Scrope(이)가 1351년 영국 요르크실르 마샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Scrope(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1373년 12월 15일 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 Margery Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년 1월 25일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Stephen Scrope nasceu em 1351, em Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Scrope, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Welles antes 15 de dezembro de 1373, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1404, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Stephen Scrope родился в 1351 г. в местности машам, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Scrope было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Welles перед 15 декабрь 1373 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 января 1404 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Stephen Scrope nació en 1351, en Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Scrope, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Joan, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Margery Welles antes de 15 de diciembre de 1373, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de enero de 1404, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
